title: Flaky Filipino Corn Wrap
description: A cultured and cozy Filipino dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, this diabetic-friendly wrap is perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, salt, and baking powder.
Add the eggs and melted butter to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape into balls.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a sheet of ssam wrap on a flat surface and place a corn circle on top.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese in the center of the corn circle.
Fold the ssam wrap over the filling to form a wrap.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until the corn is lightly browned.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
